---
title: "Vedant Acharya"
description: "Visualizing deep learning and swarms, one concept at a time."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
---

Hey, I'm Vedant. 

This is my space for sharing research, blogs, and technical write-ups. I'm currently diving deep into **Artificial Intelligence, Deep Learning, Astrodynamics, Low level programming and Swarm Intelligence**.

Expect future posts on everything from exploring NLP and Computer Vision to the math behind Rockets. 

---

## Write-ups
